case_title: YOU LIANG SONG VS. CECILIA YEE

PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER HWA SHINGH (SHANNON) KWEI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506) TOTAL JUDGMENT AMOUNT IS $6,000.00 TO BE PAID IN MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $300.00 ON OR BEFORE THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH, STARTING ON 10/15/24.
